/usr/bin/ar qc libswe.a CMakeFiles/swe.dir/swedate.o CMakeFiles/swe.dir/swehouse.o CMakeFiles/swe.dir/swejpl.o CMakeFiles/swe.dir/swemmoon.o CMakeFiles/swe.dir/swemplan.o CMakeFiles/swe.dir/sweph.o CMakeFiles/swe.dir/swephlib.o CMakeFiles/swe.dir/swecl.o CMakeFiles/swe.dir/swehel.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libswe.a
